decks.notes: This UR Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while efficiently dealing damage with aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Amped Raptor. The deck utilizes a mix of countermagic like Force of Will and bounce spells like Boomerang Basics to control the battlefield. Mishra's Bauble helps with card selection, while cantrips like Ponder and Brainstorm keep the deck running smoothly. The mana base is optimized for consistent access to the deck's spells and Wasteland is included to disrupt the opponent's mana base.

The main concept of this deck is to use the combo potential of The Fantasticar card in combination with other cards like Flow State and Quantum Riddler to quickly generate mana and draw cards. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Duress and Thoughtseize to disrupt opponents' strategies. The use of Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual allows for explosive starts, while cards like Force of Will provide protection. The deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful synergies and fast-paced gameplay.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly build up mana through cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal, while using cards like Force of Will and Thoughtseize to protect your combo pieces. The Fantasticar is a key card in this deck, allowing you to generate extra mana and draw additional cards. With the ability to quickly cycle through your deck and disrupt your opponent's strategy, this deck aims to create a powerful combo win condition using Stormchaser's Talent and Flow State.

The deck focuses on using various control elements such as countermagic, removal spells, and card draw to disrupt opponents while gradually building up card advantage and winning the game through evasive threats and powerful planeswalkers. It aims to control the game by disrupting the opponent's game plan, keeping the board under control, and ultimately outvaluing them with its efficient card selection and powerful threats. The deck also aims to capitalize on the opponent's misplays and punish them with its disruptive elements and hard-to-answer threats.

The deck focuses on quickly reducing your own life total to power up Death's Shadow, a powerful threat that grows in size as you lose life. By combining aggressive, disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will with efficient creatures like Death's Shadow and Murktide Regent, along with cheap removal like Fatal Push and Snuff Out, the deck aims to pressure the opponent while disrupting their game plan. Utilizing cantrips like Ponder and Brainstorm to dig for key cards and protect your threats, the deck aims to close out games quickly and decisively.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of efficient threats and disruption spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure and controlling the tempo of the game. The deck aims to quickly establish board presence with aggressive creatures like Nethergoyf and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, while using cards like Force of Will, Daze, and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's resources. The deck also utilizes powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to generate card advantage and provide additional threats. Overall, the deck seeks to aggressively disrupt the opponent while maintaining a strong board presence.

The deck focuses on utilizing Goblin Engineer and Goblin Welder to recur key artifacts like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Mishra's Bauble, while also benefiting from Emry, Lurker of the Loch's ability to cast artifacts from the graveyard. By assembling powerful artifacts like Loki, God of Mischief and Phyrexian Dragon Engine, the deck can create a strong board presence and generate value through various synergies. The inclusion of Urza's Saga and other artifact lands allows the deck to consistently find and deploy essential pieces to execute its combo strategy efficiently.

This deck aims to cheat powerful creatures into play by utilizing cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. The key strategy is to quickly ramp into these powerful creatures, such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, using mana acceleration like Ancient Tomb and Lotus Petal. The deck also includes counterspells like Force of Will and Spell Pierce to protect the combo. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with massive threats early in the game, while maintaining control through disruption and protection spells.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively disrupt your opponent's hand and board state while quickly overwhelming them with efficient, evasive threats. By combining powerful disruption in the form of Thoughtseize, Inquisition of Kozilek, and Fatal Push with fast mana from Dark Ritual, this deck aims to control the game early on and then close it out with efficient beaters like Nethergoyf, Barrowgoyf, and Dauthi Voidwalker. The deck also utilizes Mishra's Bauble for card advantage and to fuel delirium for the Goyfs.

The deck focuses on using the combo of Doomsday and Thassa's Oracle to win the game quickly. It includes cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will for disruption, as well as cards like Brainstorm and Ponder for card selection. The deck also includes mana acceleration like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to help cast Doomsday faster. The Fantasticar serves as a secondary win condition and also provides additional utility. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces quickly and protect them long enough to secure the victory.

The deck focuses on using a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw to control the game. It also utilizes powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to generate card advantage and control the board. The inclusion of cards like Murktide Regent and Quantum Riddler provide additional threats and pressure for the opponent. The mana base includes a mixture of fetchlands, dual lands, and utility lands like Wasteland to ensure smooth mana development and disruption for the opponent. The deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent through careful decision-making and resource management.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing counterspells like Force of Will and Force of Negation, along with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares. The deck also aims to disrupt the opponent's strategies with cards like Wasteland and Stifle. The Stoneforge Mystic and Batterskull combination provides a powerful threat while also gaining life. Additionally, the deck has card draw and selection with Brainstorm, Ponder, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The inclusion of Geist of Saint Traft and Teferi, Time Raveler offers additional win conditions and disruption, making it a versatile control deck.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and efficient creatures to disrupt the opponent's plans and protect your own win conditions. The deck focuses on card advantage and tempo plays, using cards like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Force of Will to outmaneuver the opponent. The inclusion of Murktide Regent and Meddling Mage adds a threat on the board while also hindering the opponent's strategy. The deck also has a strong mana denial plan with cards like Wasteland to slow down the opponent's development.

The main concept of the deck is to assemble a fast and aggressive creature-based strategy, leveraging powerful creature cards like Guide of Souls, Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, and Voice of Victory. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The mana base is streamlined with fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent casting of spells. Additionally, utilizing cards like Goblin Bombardment and Orcish Bowmasters provides additional value and reach to close out games quickly. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of threats and disruption.

This deck focuses on quickly putting powerful creatures into play from the graveyard using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead, allowing for explosive plays and overwhelming the opponent. It also includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo and control the game. The deck aims to outpace and outvalue the opponent by assembling its combo pieces efficiently while also having the ability to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The key strategy is to quickly reanimate threats, disrupt the opponent's plans, and apply pressure to win the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing The Fantasticar combo to set up a winning board state quickly. It includes cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to generate mana efficiently, while also running disruption like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo. Doomsday is a key card in the deck, enabling the player to stack their deck in a way that ensures a successful win condition. The inclusion of cards like Thassa's Oracle and Flow State provide alternative win conditions if needed. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and win the game before the opponent can effectively respond.
